data.body: PASS-1 review (T8 — LLM/prompt structural-completeness overlay): PASS, no findings. The overlay's precondition (this plan defines an LLM/agent system: prompts, sub-agents, reviewers, output schemas, enums) is not met — the claim path is explicitly a FAST, non-LLM, local HMAC signature-verify (the heavy LLM review runs OUT-OF-BAND via `rebar review-plan`). Enum vocabulary the plan references (INDETERMINATE / fail-open / stale-signature) belongs to the out-of-band review subsystem and is verified as fully defined in the integrated codebase (src/rebar/llm/plan_review/orchestrator.py:563, src/rebar/schemas/plan_review_verdict.schema.json, src/rebar/config.py:253-260). No undefined-but-referenced enum/protocol, no ambiguous counter, no missing sub-step fallback, no instruction-locality antipattern is provable against this plan's own scope.
